# llms.txt — huaxingpcba.com
> PCB manufacturing & assembly for global B2B buyers. IATF 16949 & ISO 9001 certified factory in Shenzhen, China.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://huaxingpcba.com/): PCB manufacturing, assembly, and sourcing overview
- [Capabilities](https://huaxingpcba.com/capabilities/): Technical specs, certifications, quality control
- [PCB Fabrication](https://huaxingpcba.com/capabilities/pcb-fabrication/): PCB fabrication capabilities, materials, specifications
- [PCBA Assembly](https://huaxingpcba.com/capabilities/pcba-assembly/): SMT and through-hole assembly services
- [PCB Types](https://huaxingpcba.com/capabilities/pcb-types/): HDI, Flex, Rigid-Flex, RF, High-Speed, Heavy Copper, Aluminum, Ceramic
- [Industries](https://huaxingpcba.com/industries/automotive/): Automotive, Medical, Industrial, Telecom, Energy, Aerospace, IoT, Consumer
- [Quick Quote](https://huaxingpcba.com/quote/): Online PCB price calculator
- [About](https://huaxingpcba.com/about/): Factory, certifications, team
- [Blog](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog/): PCB design guides, industry insights, technical articles
- [Contact](https://huaxingpcba.com/contact/): Quote request, factory address

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2010
- Certification: IATF 16949, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, UL (E354321), RoHS, REACH
- Capabilities: 2-32 layer PCBs, any-layer HDI, rigid-flex, impedance control ±5%
- Industries: Automotive, medical, industrial, telecom 5G, new energy, aerospace, IoT, consumer
- MOQ: 1 pcs for prototypes
